Experience

Senior Backend Developer

Digital India Corporation

Core backend developer on Poshan Tracker, the Government of India's nationwide nutrition-governance platform (Ministry of Women & Child Development) serving millions of beneficiaries. I own the mobile app's backend APIs and lead its microservices, database, and health-system integration work.

Software Engineer Trainee

Infogain

Completed an intensive enterprise-Java engineering program, building a strong foundation in the Spring ecosystem, Hibernate ORM, and RabbitMQ-based asynchronous messaging.

Web Developer Intern

Quantazone

Kick-started my web career during a 3-month internship building custom, responsive WordPress sites and writing SEO-driven content.

Projects

Poshan Tracker

Led backend modernization for a national public-health platform, improving reliability, scale, and response times for critical citizen services.

  • PHP
  • Laravel
  • Laravel Lumen

Portfolio Website

Built a fast, searchable portfolio experience that presents my work clearly while keeping content easy to update through structured data.

XIRR Calculator

Delivered a secure financial tool that helps users calculate complex investment returns with confidence and minimal friction.

  • Java 21
  • Spring Boot 3.5
  • Spring Security

DigiBot

Created an AI assistant that turns document collections into a conversational knowledge layer for faster, more accurate information access.

  • Python
  • FastAPI
  • LangChain

NFC Payment Application

Explored secure mobile payments through NFC, focusing on trust, authentication, and safe user transactions in a real-world interaction model.

Elite Creative Group

Delivered a polished digital presence for a creative agency, improving how the brand presented its work and services online.
